sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتْ فَاطِمَةُ الشُّرْطِيَّ عَنِ الطَّرِيقِ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ.
sentences.translation: Fatima je pitala policajca put do aerodroma.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima asked the policeman for the way to the airport.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهَا: خُذِي الْحَافِلَةَ رَقْمَ سَبْعَةٍ مِنْ هُنَا.
sentences.translation: Rekao joj je: Uzmi autobus broj sedam odavde.
sentences.translationEn: He told her: Take bus number seven from here.

sentences.translation: Zahvalila mu se i otišla na autobusku stanicu.
sentences.translationEn: She thanked him and went to the bus stop.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَتْ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ قَبْلَ مَوْعِدِ الطَّائِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stigla je na aerodrom prije polaska aviona.
sentences.translationEn: She arrived at the airport before the flight time.
